title: Inactive Customers Without Recent Orders
description: Find all customers whose status is marked as inactive and who have not placed any orders within the one-year period leading up to January 1, 2025. Customers who have never placed any orders should also be included in the result.
sql_solution: SELECT c.id, c.name FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.id = o.customer_id AND o.order_date >= '2024-01-01' WHERE c.status = 'inactive' AND o.id IS NULL;
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

result = (
    customers.alias("c")
    .join(
        orders.alias("o"),
        (col("c.id") == col("o.customer_id"))
        & (to_date(col("o.order_date")) >= lit("2024-01-01").cast("date")),
        "left"
    )
    .filter((col("c.status") == "inactive") & col("o.id").isNull())
    .select(col("c.id").alias("id"), col("c.name").alias("name"))
)
